description:
# PIP 16: Ryden Systems [Funding]

# 1. HEADER

**Category:** Funding

**Title:** “Ryden Systems” transitioning from Eveeye Star Atlas.

**Author:** Developed by “*Risingson*” 

---

# 2. SUMMARY

Risingson has been developing Eveeye for 1.5+ years while living off savings account providing gaming depth and real economic value to the Star Atlas community for free. 
 
While loving working on the tools he cannot continue without a sustainable income and therefore will convert to a paid system. This funding request supports Eveeye to keep running until a sustainable income can be generated hopefully. 

---

# 3. MOTIVATION

This proposal addresses securing ongoing and stable development of a core Star Atlas community tool. Eveeye has demonstrated its value over the course of 1.5+ years by helping players via aggregated views of individual and general Sage data, smart tools and real-time displays to empower decisions on profitable asset use — even -or especially- at times of Solana congestions or when Starcomm issues arise. 

Sustaining and expanding such tools is part of the vision of the Star Atlas metaverse. By supporting this transition it gets ensured that Eveeye remains supportive to, expanding on and innovative within Star Atlas. 

## 3.1 Background

Eveeye started as a hobbyist’s EVE Online mapping tool. When Sage Labs launched, Risingson leveraged this existing infrastructure to build a Star Atlas–specific version of Eveeye, which quickly became a community staple.

## 3.2 Rebranding 

“Ryden Systems” merges the legacy of the “Risingson” username with the developer’s real-world name, forging a brand identity that seamlessly fits Star Atlas’s futuristic lore and meta. 

## 3.3 Personal Situation

Transitioned from a stable corporate position to devoting full-time attention to Eveeye Star Atlas in April 2024. With two children, aged 10 and 13, plus household obligations, the lack of a steady paycheck poses increasing financial strain.Forming Ryden Systems as a legitimate business (with tax and legal considerations) is the desired path to making this passion sustainable.  

## 3.4 Current Income Streams

* **Golden Eye Support:** About 225 USD monthly from 28 wallets (February to March data), plus some prepaid ATLAS for upcoming months.
* Starpath Referral:** Adds 285 USD in the same period.
* Totaling ~510 USD/month:** About 340 EUR net once converted and taxed.
* **Server Costs & Infrastructure:** Low overhead (~25 EUR/month) thanks to Star Atlas–provided free RPC usage, plus minimal server fees.
 *Existing income falls short of sustaining full-time development.*

---

# 4. SPECIFICATION

**Funding Request:**

Grant of 5% of the DAO’s Ecosystem Fund’s budget in line with PIP-4. 
 

**Enable Full-Time Development:**

Risingson is converting to a paid system to try to continue developing Ryden Systems full-time. A commitment to work on building out robust sets of features and ensuring consistent development on future Star Atlas modules. 

---

# 5. STAKEHOLDER IMPACT

**Players:** Gain continuous access to high-quality tools for fleet management, strategic planning, real-time blockchain interactions and many more. This fosters deeper engagement and a richer gameplay experience. 
 
**Star Atlas DAO:** By using its funds the DAO supports a builder with a proven track record, ensuring the community continues to receive essential enhancements and innovations that keep Star Atlas growing and thriving while aiding active player retention during alpha phases. 
 
**Ryden Systems:** The proposal supports Ryden Systems’ start-up to full-time dedication. 

---

# 6. IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS

Risingson is the sole person involved in immediate transition and continuous implementation of new features, expanding on and maintenance of existing feature sets.

--- 

# 7. TIMELINE

**Immediate Start** 

Funding to commence upon approval by the DAO, enabling Risingson to start-up Ryden Systems. 

---

# 8. COST & RESOURCE ALLOCATION

**One-Time Costs**

5% of Ecosystem Fund in line with PIP-4. 

**Management**

Ryden Systems (led by Risingson) is solely responsible for development and maintenance.

----

# 9. ADDITIONAL DETAILS 

**Conflicts of Interest**

None. 

**Earlier Versions**

This is the second iteration of a funding request for Eveeye Star Atlas (PIP Draft:The Rise of Ryden Systems)
